description: Prospect accepts the connection but declines interest on the first reply. Planner should end with not_interested.

prospect.name: Jordan Kim
prospect.title: Staff ML Engineer
prospect.about: ML platform engineer focused on feature stores and training pipelines. Ten years across Meta and Databricks.

recent_posts.text: We finally shipped our internal feature store v2 — biggest lesson was investing in lineage early.

prospect.outreach_topic: Series A ML infra roles in the portfolio
prospect.notes: Strong ML platform background; polite but firm when not exploring.

replies.text: Hey Nova, thanks for reaching out but I'm not looking for anything new right now. Happy at Databricks and plan to stay for a while. Best of luck!
